description: You are a laboratory safety manager. Create a storage segregation plan CSV file for the five chemicals listed in '~/Desktop/shipment_manifest.txt' based on their official CAMEO Chemicals Reactive Groups from https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/. For each chemical, identify its exact Reactive Group and assign a Storage Code (A, B, O, F, or G) using these precedence rules: Code O (Oxidizer) if the group contains 'Oxidizing Agents'; Code A (Acid) if it contains 'Acids'; Code B (Base) if it contains 'Bases' or 'Amines'; Code F (Flammable) if it contains 'Ketones', 'Aldehydes', 'Esters', or 'Hydrocarbons'; and Code G (General) for any other group. Save the results to '~/Documents/storage_plan.csv' with columns 'Chemical Name', 'Reactive Group', and 'Storage Code'.
